prompt:
A compact achievement badge displayed on a dark desk mat near a small monitoring dashboard screen and notebook, suggesting completion of multi-node health monitoring drills. The badge should feature abstract signal-wave and node-link iconography without any readable text, making it feel like a systems-observability credential rather than a lab uniform accessory.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a near-future ops-workstation aesthetic: soft moody desk lighting, realistic metal or enamel texture, no logos, no readable characters, and no identifiable faces. Keep the badge centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as a DSPACE achievement token.
